# Test Fixtures

## apple-attestation.ts

Test vectors from Apple's official Attestation Object Validation Guide.
Source: https://developer.apple.com/documentation/devicecheck/attestation-object-validation-guide

The attestation object was generated by Apple. The private key is locked in a
Secure Enclave and is not available, so no matching assertion can be produced.

## generate-assertion.ts

Generates synthetic assertion objects using WebCrypto P-256 key pairs.
Used for testing assertion verification with full control over both
the signing key and verification.
